payload.content: Before emitting the query, check that it does not duplicate the claim verbatim. The query should target evidence not yet retrieved in hop 1; if your draft mirrors the claim, rewrite it to focus on an entity or relation that hop 1 did not surface.

rationale: Counterfactual probe: HoVer's GEPA prompt has nothing for verify-before-output × create_query_hop2. Tests whether explicit pre-emission distinctness checks reduce hop-1/hop-2 redundancy on retrieval coverage.
